abilities.name: Ironwall
abilities.effect: Stance. Edren guards a single ally, absorbing 50% of physical damage dealt to them. AP generated per the standard hit-based rule (1 AP per hit absorbed, bonus +1 AP if hit exceeds 10% of Edren's max HP).
abilities.description: Take a defensive stance, absorbing damage for an ally.

abilities.name: Rampart
abilities.effect: Stance. Edren guards the entire back row, absorbing 30% of all damage dealt to back-row allies. Lower absorption rate but wider coverage.
abilities.description: Guard the entire back row, absorbing a portion of incoming damage.

abilities.name: Riposte
abilities.effect: Reaction. When Edren absorbs an attack in any stance, he counters with a physical strike dealing 1.5x normal damage. Can trigger once per enemy turn. Grants 1 AP on hit.
abilities.description: Counter absorbed attacks with a powerful physical strike.

abilities.name: Aegis Veil
abilities.effect: Edren channels ley-line energy into a magical barrier on one ally, reducing magic damage by 40% for 3 turns.
abilities.description: Channel ley-line energy into a barrier that reduces magic damage.

abilities.name: Shatter Guard
abilities.effect: Edren breaks his stance explosively, dealing physical damage to all enemies equal to total damage absorbed since entering the stance (capped at 2x his max HP). Minimum damage: Edren's Attack x 1 (even if no damage was absorbed). Ends the current stance.
abilities.description: Break stance explosively, unleashing all absorbed damage on enemies.

abilities.name: Steadfast Resolve
abilities.effect: Immediately cleanses all Despair and Silence from every ally, then grants +20% DEF and +20% MDEF to all allies for 3 turns. The cleanse fires before the buff — a Despaired ally is freed, then shielded.
abilities.description: Steel the party's resolve, cleansing despair and bolstering defenses.

abilities.name: Oathkeeper
abilities.effect: Edren dual-wields his own sword and Cael's blade. For 3 turns, all Bulwark stances gain +50% absorption AND Riposte triggers automatically on every absorbed hit. While active, Edren's attack commands hit twice.
abilities.description: Dual-wield both swords, empowering stances and doubling attacks.
